***REMOVED***decamelize [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/sindresorhus/decamelize.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/sindresorhus/decamelize)

> Convert a camelized string into a lowercased one with a custom separator<br>
> Example: `unicornRainbow` → `unicorn_rainbow`


#***REMOVED***Install

```
$ npm install --save decamelize
```


#***REMOVED***Usage

```js
const decamelize = require('decamelize');

decamelize('unicornRainbow');
//=> 'unicorn_rainbow'

decamelize('unicornRainbow', '-');
//=> 'unicorn-rainbow'
```


#***REMOVED***API

##***REMOVED***decamelize(input, [separator])

###***REMOVED***input

Type: `string`

###***REMOVED***separator

Type: `string`<br>
Default: `_`


#***REMOVED***Related

See [`camelcase`](https://github.com/sindresorhus/camelcase) for the inverse.
